title: Constructs
summary: 9618 AS programming constructs — sequence, selection (IF), and iteration (FOR, WHILE, REPEAT).
learningObjectives: Use IF, THEN, ELSE for selection.
Write FOR, WHILE, and REPEAT loops.
Choose appropriate construct for a problem.

simpleExplanation.title: Control flow
simpleExplanation.summary: Sequence runs line by line. Selection chooses paths. Iteration repeats until a condition is met.
steps: FOR i ← 1 TO n — count-controlled loop.

sections.content: **Constructs** (11.2) with **structured programming** (11.3) are core Paper 2. Trace **nested IF inside WHILE** carefully — indentation helps.
